articles.title: This 22-year-old cancer survivor is running Boston for MGH
articles.description:
"Every mile I run will be in gratitude to my doctors, to the AYA program, to my survivorship friends, and to every patient who sits in a hospital room feeling scared and alone."

The post This 22-year-old cancer survivor is running Boston for MGH appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 22-year-old cancer survivor Grace Taylor will run the Boston Marathon for MGH.
Taylor expresses gratitude to her doctors and the AYA program during her run.
Her participation raises awareness for young adult cancer survivors in Boston.
